title: Whale carcass between Dias, Hartenbos to be removed
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A whale carcass washed up...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A whale carcass washed up on the beach between Dias Beach and Hartenbos today, 2 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A whale carcass washed up on the beach between Dias Beach and Hartenbos today, 2 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality issued a notice to inform residents of its removal.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality issued a notice to inform residents of its removal."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It said some members of its Environmental Department are making arrangements for the carcass removal, which is in an advanced stage of decomposition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Members of the public are alerted that heavy machinery will be deployed on the beach for the removal and therefore, it is advised to avoid the area,” the municipality said.","html":"“Members of the public are alerted that heavy machinery will be deployed on the beach for the removal and therefore, it is advised to avoid the area,” the municipality said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Whale carcass between Dias, Hartenbos to be removed
